title: Extended: issuer (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral identification of the Pack's issuer — who is vouching for the attestation. Distinct from the signing key identifier (kid) carried in signature headers: 'issuer' is the semantic claim of identity; 'kid' is the cryptographic key identifier. Verifiers reconcile the two via their own trust policy (per ADR 0006). The spec does not require the issuer field and kid to be derivable from one another.

issuerType.description: Kind of issuer. Canonical values: 'organization', 'individual', 'automated_system'. Enumeration is OPEN.

legalEntity.description: Legal entity information for organization issuers. Open shape. Typical fields: 'jurisdiction', 'registrationNumber', 'legalName'.

accreditation.description: Accreditations, certifications, or attestations the issuer claims to hold. Open shape per item. Typical fields: 'type', 'scheme', 'identifier', 'validFrom', 'validUntil', 'issuingBody'. Informational only — the spec does not validate accreditation claims; verifiers form their own trust judgements via external mechanisms.

contact.description: Contact information. Open shape. Typical fields: 'email', 'url', 'address'.
